reviews.review_msg: Simply the best. So accommodating. Blessss him

Trevor is a rare instructor who can make you passionate about any material. The course description can seem a bit intimidating at first, especially if your background is mainly Ling but if you keep up w/ lectures, problem sets and office hours, you'll be okay. He's also very responsive over email and happy to provide extra problems if you're stuck!

Trevor was actually my TA for this course, but he does an exceptional job at reviewing lectures! He answers questions clearly, and even if you don't quite understand a concept, he takes the time to help as long as you ask. I definitely recommend going to office hours. I would love to take another class with him, whether he's a TA or the prof!!!!!

He was my TA for the class. Easy to reach, even outside of class. Made class light and informative. Answered any and all questions even helped me with other courses. Check out his Youtube channel, "trevtutor", also very helpful for linguistics people!

There are no better professors than Trevor. The pinnacle of a good prof. Very clear lectures and assignments that were perfectly relevant to the material. Always accessible to ask Qs and gives great answers.

The grading on the papers was a tough but it was an interesting course that taught a lot about syntax. Trevor responds quickly to all of my emails and met on Zoom whenever I asked. I recommend this course if you took LING 322 already!

Trevor was a great professor. What stood out the most was his ability to teach the content in a simple way that helps you to have a good understanding. To get the most out of the course you just have to watch or go to the lectures and pay attention, the rest should come fairly easy. His clear explanations helped me learn a lot from this class.
This course was so fun! The lectures were great and the project was a lot of fun. I am not a linguistics major but I wish found this class earlier so I could take linguistics courses in my degree.
This man is fantastic. He gets back to your emails ASAP, communicates what you need to improve on and is overall just a great guy.
